**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level engineering Frankenstein deconstruction and '5-person omnipotent contracting team' physical demotion probe. The illusory Apple global supply chain OEM template in the original data has been physically pulverized. This enterprise, named 'Su Haihua New Energy,' holds a hardcore license for 'power transmission and supply installation,' yet was inexplicably categorized into 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing' by the official system. Its business license is an encyclopedia that challenges human imagination: extending from 'PV/wind farm system R&D' to 'interior decoration,' then to 'landscaping, earthwork engineering,' and finally even arranging 'horticultural planting, agricultural and sideline product sales.' The forensic logic engine directly intercepted its fatal flaw: in this 'new energy giant' claiming to handle sea, land, and air, and spanning primary, secondary, and tertiary industries, the insured headcount is a mere 5 people! The registered capital is 10 million, but the paid-in capital is a pitiful 170,000 RMB. The spatial coordinates are located at 'Room 305, Block B, Moling Center, No. 2 Qingshuiting West Road.' The logical deduction instantly enters a highly absurd stand-up comedy routine: in a small 3rd-floor office, a boss with 4 salespeople, pocketing 170,000 RMB, claims they can not only contract State Grid projects but also build wind power systems, dig earthwork, do landscaping, and incidentally grow flowers and sell agricultural products in the office? The probe mercilessly deleted all the grand narratives of 'manufacturing, R&D,' extracting what these 5 people can actually manage under a 170,000 budget: 'construction engineering construction; electromechanical equipment installation; earthwork engineering; landscaping.' The truth is starkly naked and strongly features Chinese township enterprise characteristics: this is a 100% pure 5-Employee All-Round Engineering Contractor & Miscellaneous Broker (an office building shell). The boss spent over a hundred thousand advancing funds to create this shell with insanely heaven-defying qualifications, whose sole purpose is to frantically bid on projects in Jiangning District or surrounding townships in preparation for 'subcontracting.' Today they take a community power distribution room renovation, tomorrow they contract an earthwork or tree-planting landscaping job, and the day after they even resell some agricultural products and labor protection supplies. It absolutely does not produce any industrial goods; the official 'Manufacturing' tag is the worst irony to the real economy.
